hero.heading: Stock Speed. Custom Precision.
hero.sub: Cabinetry designed for your space and delivered from our Toronto warehouse.!

services.title: Kitchen
services.desc: Modern frameless cabinetry with clean European style, wide finish options, and the flexibility to fit real homes.

services.title: Vanity
services.desc: Moisture-resistant materials and refined finishes that bring both function and elegance to everyday bathroom spaces.

services.title: Closet
services.desc: From walk-in wardrobes to compact bedroom closets, our systems keep your space organized and the look clean.

services.title: Semi-Custom Whole-Home Cabinetry
services.desc: Standard dimensions with expanded possibilities — more finishes, materials, and design combinations within a structured system.

cabinet_series.title: Classic Series
cabinet_series.desc: Our Classic Series is a reliable in-stock cabinetry system with timeless finishes and consistent sizing, built to support both everyday projects and semi-custom upgrades.

cabinet_series.title: Delight Series
cabinet_series.desc: The Delight Series offers a step up in both finish and design, with a wider selection of colors and materials to suit more refined interiors. It brings added flexibility while maintaining the efficiency and consistency of our core cabinet system.

cabinet_series.title: Grand Series
cabinet_series.desc: The Grand Series focuses on more modern, design-forward finishes, including a curated selection from AGT and EGGER. It expands the palette with richer textures and contemporary tones, giving designers more freedom to create distinctive spaces.

cabinet_series.title: Luxury Series
cabinet_series.desc: New in 2026, the Luxury Series represents our most elevated offering we have so far, featuring advanced lacquer finishes and the new Slim Shaker profile. With refined details and a more sophisticated look, it is designed for projects that demand a higher level of finish and visual impact.

story.p1: GoldenHome has been delivering high-quality cabinetry solutions since 1999, building a strong global foundation across multiple markets. Today, GoldenHome Cabinetry Eastern Canada brings that experience closer to home through a growing local manufacturing and supply network based in Ontario.
story.p2: With integrated warehousing and local production capabilities, we are able to support projects with greater speed, flexibility, and consistency. From in-stock cabinetry to locally customized solutions, our approach is designed to meet the needs of contractors, designers, and homeowners across Canada.

cta.heading: Ready to explore your options?
cta.sub: Request a free design quote and discover the materials, styles, and finishes that suit your vision.
